description: An L&D specialist needs to upload a new version of a compliance training video to the LMS.

nodes.task_description: Identify the existing training course in the LMS.
Upload the new video file to the course.

expected_outcome.value: Specialist successfully uploads the new video.

nodes.task_description: Deactivate the old video and publish the changes to the course.

expected_outcome.value: Specialist updates the course content, ensuring only the new video is visible.
